form.title: New Connection
form.subtitle: Configure one SSH profile for terminals, SFTP, port forwarding, and remote file editing.
form.name: Name (optional)
form.agent_forwarding_hint: Enable only on trusted servers. A malicious server may use your local SSH Agent to authenticate to other hosts.
form.legacy_ssh_compatibility_hint: Off by default. Enables older algorithms such as SHA-1 DH, CBC ciphers, and SHA-1 MACs only for this connection.
form.save_connection_hint: Off by default the first time; your choice will be remembered after that.
form.post_connect_command_hint: Optional. Runs once after the interactive shell opens.
form.validation_required: Please enter target host, port, and target username.
form.test_pending: Connection test will be enabled when the russh transport is wired in.
form.test_not_supported_kbi: Test connection is not supported for 2FA authentication
form.key_path_not_ready: SSH key authentication needs the key path picker before it can connect.
form.certificate_not_ready: Certificate authentication needs key and certificate path pickers before it can connect.
form.keyboard_interactive_not_ready: Keyboard-interactive authentication needs the native prompt flow before it can connect.
form.certificate_note: This is for OpenSSH CA-signed certificates, not regular SSH keys. If you have a private key with a passphrase, use the SSH Key tab instead.
form.agent_desc: Authenticate using the system SSH Agent
form.agent_hint: Ensure your SSH Agent is running and has the required key(s) loaded.
form.two_factor_hint: The server will prompt for credentials during connection. Common uses: TOTP code, hardware token, challenge-response.
form.two_factor_warning: Note: 2FA connections cannot auto-reconnect. You will need to reconnect manually if the session disconnects.
form.key_path_required: SSH key path is required for key authentication.
form.certificate_paths_required: SSH key and certificate paths are required for certificate authentication.
form.proxy_jump_saved_connection_hint: Selecting a saved connection fills this jump server without exposing saved passwords or passphrases.
form.proxy_jump_kbi_hint: Keyboard-interactive jump servers will ask for their prompts during connection.
form.proxy_jump_agent_desc: Authenticate to this jump server using the system SSH Agent.
form.proxy_jump_required: Please enter jump server host and username.
form.proxy_chain_kbi_unsupported: Proxy chain connections do not support 2FA / keyboard-interactive authentication.
form.managed_key_hint: Managed keys stay in the local keychain. This connection stores only the key reference and optional passphrase.
form.managed_key_required: Managed SSH key is required for managed-key authentication.
form.runtime_node_missing: Runtime SSH node is no longer available

host_key.unknown_message: This is the first time OxideTerm has seen this SSH host key. Verify the fingerprint before continuing.
host_key.changed_warning: The saved SSH host key for this host does not match the server key. This may indicate a man-in-the-middle attack.
host_key.cancelled: SSH host key confirmation was cancelled.
host_key.changed_requires_remove: Changed host keys are blocked until the saved key is removed.

drill_down.title: Drill Down into New Server
drill_down.agent_desc: Authenticate using the system SSH agent.
drill_down.agent_hint: Ensure your SSH agent is running and has the required key(s) loaded.

toast.proxy_hop_kbi_unsupported: Jump host does not support keyboard-interactive/2FA
toast.proxy_hop_auth_unsupported: Jump host uses an unsupported auth type

errors.chain_busy_desc: Another connection chain is in progress. Please wait.
errors.node_connecting_desc: This node is already being connected.

summary.key_exchange: The server only offered key exchange algorithms that are not enabled by the current security policy.
summary.host_key: The server host key algorithms do not match the current security policy.
summary.host_key_ssh_rsa: The server only supports ssh-rsa host keys, which are disabled by default.
summary.cipher: The server cipher list has no overlap with the current client policy.
summary.cipher_legacy: The server only offered legacy ciphers such as CBC or 3DES. Upgrade the server or enable a legacy compatibility mode.
summary.mac: The server MAC list has no overlap with the current client policy. Upgrade the server or enable a compatible MAC policy.
summary.compression: The server compression modes do not overlap with the client policy.
